description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a solid, uniform color. The sofa has two large seat cushions and a continuous, straight backrest, both of which appear to be well-padded for comfort. Two loose, square throw pillows are placed on one side, adding a touch of softness and visual interest. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, contributing to the sofa's geometric silhouette. The legs are short and barely visible, suggesting a low-profile stance. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with two large seat cushions, a straight backrest, and two loose throw pillows. The design is minimalist, with smooth, solid-colored upholstery and low, subtle legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, straight backrest, and two throw pillows on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the straight armrest, and the profile of the backrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the sofa's solid, rectangular form.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest and the arrangement of the throw pillows against the backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and a continuous backrest cushion; two loose, square throw pillows on one side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a flat profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible and likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, unsegmented and smoothly upholstered.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color with a smooth, matte fabric finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
